Export.Routine: ZSETUP2 ; for IRIS2 zn "USER" do $system.OBJ.Delete("Sample.*") do $system.OBJ.Import("/opt/irisbuild/demo/Address.xml","ck") do $system.OBJ.Import("/opt/irisbuild/demo/Person.xml","ck") do $system.OBJ.Import("/opt/irisbuild/demo/Employee.xml","ck") do $system.OBJ.Import("/opt/irisbuild/demo/Company.xml","ck") do $system.OBJ.Import("/opt/irisbuild/demo/Employee.xml","ck") write ##class(Sample.Person).Populate(40) write ##class(Sample.Company).Populate(7) write ##class(Sample.Employee).Populate(32) quit
